Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 140 upvotes, 11 comments
  2. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 81 upvotes, 8 comments
  3. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 383 upvotes, 67 comments
  4. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 845 upvotes, 169 comments
  5. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 131 upvotes, 20 comments
  6. EPA Official in Charge of Methane Regs Wrote Oil Industry Argument Against Them 31 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Iguanaworks has closed down. USB Infrared hardware open source maker 54 upvotes, 6 comments
  8. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 38 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 67 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 66 upvotes, 11 comments
  11. Someone at BrowserStack Is Leaking Users' Email Address 225 upvotes, 55 comments
  12. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 73 upvotes, 15 comments
  13. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 64 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 252 upvotes, 77 comments
  15. Japanese, French and Omani Vessels Cross Strait of Hormuz 52 upvotes, 11 comments
  16. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 193 upvotes, 58 comments
  17. Banray.eu: Raising awareness of the terrible idea that is always-on AI glasses 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  18. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 44 upvotes, 12 comments
  19. Shared mutable state in Rust (2022) 24 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 737 upvotes, 347 comments
  21. My Google Workspace account suspension 161 upvotes, 65 comments
  22. Common drug tests lead to tens of thousands wrongful arrests a year 61 upvotes, 22 comments
  23. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 172 upvotes, 86 comments
  24. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 109 upvotes, 54 comments
  25. A Claude Code skill that makes Claude talk like a caveman, cutting token use 284 upvotes, 188 comments
  26. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 470 upvotes, 345 comments
  27. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon 17 upvotes, 7 comments
  28. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 442 upvotes, 389 comments
  29. SPF/PC v4 for MS-DOS, FreeDOS, x86 10 upvotes, 3 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
